authPage.footerDescription: One account for all Lumin products
authPage.acceptAllTermsAndConditions: I accept all Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
authPage.resendVerifyYourEmail: Your email has not been verified yet. Don’t receive the code?
authPage.recommendWorkEmail: Recommend work email but not required.

signOutModal.title: Are you sure you want to leave?

errorMessage.forceLogoutTitle: You are already logged in Lumin
errorMessage.avatarOversize: The picture you uploaded is too large. Please upload a file below {{avatarSizeLimit}}MB.
errorMessage.alreadySignupByThirdParty: This email address is currently being used with Google, Dropbox or Microsoft. Please sign in with Google, Dropbox or Microsoft.
errorMessage.passwordExpired: Your Lumin password has expired. Try signing in with Google or reset your password.
errorMessage.userNotFound: No account has been registered with this email.
errorMessage.verifyRecaptchaFailed: Verify recaptcha failed. Please try again.
errorMessage.alreadySignedInAnotherMethod: You already signed in with another method
errorMessage.unVerifyAccount: This account has not been verified yet
errorMessage.alreadyVerified: This email was verified successfully. Please sign in.
errorMessage.validFile: File must be of type jpeg, jpg or png
errorMessage.similarPassword: The password cannot be used because the password is too similar to your email.
errorMessage.leakedPassword: The password cannot be used because the password has been found in data breaches and must no longer be used.
errorMessage.grpcError: Something went wrong when the system call gRpc
errorMessage.notContainUrl: This field must not contain URL(s).
errorMessage.passwordExpiredHasLink: Your Lumin password has expired. Try signing in with Google or reset your password.
errorMessage.maxLengthMessage: This field must have no more than {{length}} characters.
errorMessage.minLengthMessage: This field must be more than {{length}} characters.
errorMessage.tnc: Please agree with the Terms & Conditions to sign up.
errorMessage.alreadySignUpBy: This email address is currently being used with {{loginService}}. Please sign in with {{loginService}}.
errorMessage.passwordMustHaveAtLeastCharacters: The password must have at least {{length}} characters.
errorMessage.passwordMustHaveNoMoreThanCharacters: The password must have no more than {{length}} characters.

expiredLink.title: The link has expired.
expiredLink.subtitle: The invitation link that you are looking for is expired

forgotPassword.forceLogoutTitle: You are already logged in Lumin
forgotPassword.forceLogoutMessage: You need to logout before reseting password.
forgotPassword.externalLoginMessage: This email address is currently being used with Google Drive or Dropbox. There's no need for a password here.
forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.enterYourEmail: Enter your email below to receive your password reset instructions.
forgotPassword.passwordResetEmailHasBeenSent: A password reset email has been sent to your email address.
forgotPassword.followThePromptsToReset: Please check it and follow the prompts to reset.
forgotPassword.note: If you don’t see our email, it probably means you haven’t signed up yet. If so, simply sign up to continue.

verifyAccount.verifyYourEmail: We need to verify your email address
verifyAccount.messageVerifyYourEmail: We’ve just sent a verification email to {{email}}.
verifyAccount.probablyAlreadySignedUp: If you don’t see our email, it probably means you’ve already signed up. If so, simply sign in to continue.
verifyAccount.alreadyVerified: This email was verified successfully. Please sign in.
verifyAccount.verificationInvalid: This verification email is invalid or has already been used or expired. Please input your email address to receive new verification link!

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for doesn’t seem to exist.

profileSettings.luminSlogan: Share, edit and collaborate on PDFs

profileAvatar.noteUploadAvatar: You can upload: png, jpg. Max size: {{size}}MB

modalSessionExpired.title: Session expire warning
modalSessionExpired.message: Your account session is expired. Login again to continue your work.

resetPassword.message: For security purposes, by clicking Log out, you'll be logged out from any devices and you’ll need to log in again with the new password on those devices.

expiredPermissionModal.title: Oops, your access permission has been expired
expiredPermissionModal.message: Your account has been deleted. For details, Contact Support.
expiredPermissionModal.messageProvisioning: Your account was deleted via provisioning from your $t(terms:organization).

socialSignIn.emailPasswordWarning: Once your sign-in method is changed, you cannot sign in with your email & password.
socialSignIn.signInMethodTooltip: After changing your authentication method, you can no longer log in using your {{method}} account credentials.

requestMemberEnableSocialSignIn.title: Request to enable {{provider}} sign-in
requestMemberEnableSocialSignIn.message: You must change the sign-in method of {{email}} to {{provider}} to access this document.

enableSocialSignInFailed.title: Cannot use this {{provider}} account
enableSocialSignInFailed.message: It seems you signed up with another email. Please make {{email}} your default {{provider}} account to sign into Lumin.

linkAccountFailedModal.title: Cannot use this Google account
linkAccountFailedModal.message: It seems like you have signed up with another email. Please make {{email}} your default Google account to sign into Lumin.

linkAccountModal.title: Link your Google account
linkAccountModal.message: You have signed up with another email. Please make {{email}} your default Google account to sign into Lumin.

forceLogInAgain.title: Log in again
forceLogInAgain.message:
Your authentication method changed to {{provider}}.
Please log in with your {{provider}} account {{email}} to continue.

account.title: Account
account.yourAccountWillBeDeletedOn: Your account will be deleted on {{time}}
account.noteDeleteAccount: By deleting your account, you will immediately lose access to your $t(terms:organizations), $t(terms:teams) and documents. This action cannot be undone.
account.messageDeactivateYourAccount: You are able to access to this account until it is deleted forever in 3 days.
account.messageDeactivateYourAccount1: Deleting your account will delete all your associated data such as your documents, including those stored on other Lumin products (like Lumin Sign).
account.messageDeactivateYourAccount2: Besides, your $t(terms:organizations) and $t(terms:teams) will be transferred randomly to other members.

reactivateAccount.title: Cannot perform this action
reactivateAccount.message: Reactivate it first to do this action.

resendVerificationEmail.haveSentANewEmail: We've sent a new verification email to {{email}}.
resendVerificationEmail.checkYourInbox: Please check your inbox (and maybe your spam folder, just in case) to keep using Lumin.
resendVerificationEmail.notSeeOurEmail: If you don't see our email, it's probably means you're either already registered or haven't joined us yet. If so, simply sign in or sign up to continue.

changeEmailModal.title: Session expired warning
changeEmailModal.sessionExpiredMessage: Your account session is expired. Login again to continue your work.
changeEmailModal.accountChangeMessage: Your account has been changed to {{email}}. Please sign in again to continue your work.

newPrivacyPolicyModal.title: Updates to our Terms of Use
newPrivacyPolicyModal.description1: We’ve updated our Terms of Use to improve clarity and reflect recent changes.
keyChangesList: Shorter retention period for free accounts.
Clearer rules on account use and dispute resolution.
New sections on liability, AI use, and employer accounts.
newPrivacyPolicyModal.description2: To continue using our platform, please review and accept the updated Terms of Use. By clicking “I agree,” you confirm that you have read and agree to the new terms.

enableXeroSignInFailed.title: Cannot use this Xero account
enableXeroSignInFailed.message: It seems you signed up with another email. Please visit xero.com to log out and log back in with your {{email}} Xero account, then return here to retry.

signInSSOPage.title: Sign in with SSO
signInSSOPage.description: Your $t(terms:organization) admin has enabled Single Sign-On. Continue with SSO to access your Lumin account.
signInSSOPage.emailNotConfiguredForSSOMessage: This email is not configured for SAML SSO to this $t(terms:organization). Please contact your administrator.

sso.notAllowedChangeUserInfo: To change your profile information, update your corporate directory in SSO Identity Provider.
sso.ssoSignInBannerContent: Account information is sourced from your SSO profile. To change your profile information, update your corporate directory in SSO Identity Provider.
